message:
refactor(permissions): use BTreeMap for PermissionsFile deserialization, simplify decision_is_active

Switch PermissionsFile.decisions from HashMap to BTreeMap so that
deserialization produces sorted keys matching the sorted serialization
order introduced in the previous commit. This eliminates a HashMap→sort
step during save and ensures round-trip stability.

Simplify decision_is_active() by replacing the match block with
Option::is_none_or(), which is more idiomatic and equivalent.

Update the permissions_file_serde_roundtrip test to use BTreeMap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
